root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(partition by tab.member_group_no order by tab.member_group_no , tab.contact_status , tab.membership_no , tab.loan_contract_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXX' ) as loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest , sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear_year , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.begin_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as last_calcint_date
, (select max( pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( loan_detail.loan_payment_date ,'dd/mm/yyyy' ) ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail loan_detail , sc_lon_m_loan_card loan_card where ( loan_card.loan_contract_no = loan_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( loan_detail.loan_payment_date <= '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) ) as interest_to
, '!last_calcint_date_1!' as loan_payment_date , pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) as calcint , nvl( sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear,0 ) as interest_arrear
, (select nvl(max(interest_arrear_bal),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and seq_no = (select max(seq_no) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail tab where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and loan_payment_date <= '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) ) as interest_arrear_bal
, (select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( max(interest_to) , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and seq_no = (select max(seq_no) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail tab where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and loan_payment_date <= '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) ) as last_interest_tdate
, (select nvl(max(principal_balance),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and seq_no = (select max(seq_no) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail tab where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and loan_payment_date <= '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) ) as principal_balance
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) + sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear > 0 and (select nvl(max(principal_balance),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and seq_no = (select max(seq_no) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail tab where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and loan_payment_date <= '!last_calcint_date_1!' ) ) > 0 /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) tab
